About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data shows two exceptional long-term performers at the top of the rankings. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 93.7, delivering 967.71% returns over 10 years and crushing SPY by 704.87% over the same period, while maintaining all four moving average supports and a "strong_buy" signal. EACO (#2) displays even more extreme long-term performance with 1955.51% in 10-year returns—nearly double CLMT—though its 10-year momentum ratio of 4.02 suggests recent acceleration that may warrant closer scrutiny for sustainability. Both securities show clean technical setups with normal volatility and positive ratios across multiple timeframes, but EACO's massive recent outperformance (ratio_10y_5y of 4.02 vs CLMT's 1.79) indicates it may be in a more explosive phase of its cycle. The correlation data reveals both tickers have mild negative correlation to tech (QQQ at -0.173 for CLMT) and show strength in energy and materials sectors, suggesting they represent a distinct market segment from recent growth-driven rallies.
